name: wenjuan-survey
description: Claude Code plugin for completing surveys, exams and assessments, collection forms, voting campaigns, satisfaction studies, online payment forms, and 360 reviews through the Wenjuan MCP service.

wj_api_key.title: WJ-API-Key
wj_api_key.description: Sign in to www.wenjuan.com, then go to Personal Center => API Integration => MCP Integration to get your WJ-API-Key. After installing the plugin from your marketplace or loading it locally in Claude Code, open the plugin settings, paste only the key value into the WJ-API-Key field, and save. Do not edit JSON or config files manually.
